task_completion.description: Verify the agent logged into OSCAR EMR using the provided administrator credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR login screen showing username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', and PIN '1117' entered, OR the main OSCAR dashboard showing the user is successfully logged in as 'oscardoc'.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent accessed the Administration interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The browser displays the OSCAR Administration panel or dashboard.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Public Holiday configuration section.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A page, tab, or dialog specifically designated for managing or adding 'Public Holidays' or clinic schedule exceptions is visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent entered the correct holiday name and date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Input fields within the holiday configuration screen containing the text 'Victoria Day' and the date 'May 18, 2026' (or '2026-05-18').

task_completion.description: Verify the public holiday was successfully saved and configured clinic-wide.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A success/confirmation message indicating the holiday was added, OR 'Victoria Day' with the date '2026-05-18' appearing in the active list of configured public holidays.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with OSCAR EMR through a web browser GUI.
integrity.visual_evidence: The OSCAR EMR interface is rendered in a standard web browser window, not accessed via terminal scripts, curl commands, or API testing tools.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not bypass the UI by directly modifying the database via terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no terminal windows open showing MySQL/MariaDB queries directly inserting the holiday record into the database.

integrity.description: Verify the agent entered the holiday details into the actual application forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: The text 'Victoria Day' and the date are typed into the proper OSCAR EMR web form fields, rather than just being typed into a text editor, notepad, or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires adding a public holiday to the OSCAR EMR system. The correct holiday name is exactly 'Victoria Day'. The correct date is May 18, 2026 (often formatted as 2026-05-18). The agent must use the administrator account with username 'oscardoc', password 'oscar', and PIN '1117'.
